visual_summary: CTA is a cta UI component from the floatui corpus. It provides reusable other behavior and styling for React or web UI screens.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics: Name: CTA Description: CTA is a cta UI component from the floatui corpus. It provides reusable other behavior and styling for React or web UI screens. Style: utility-styled Interactions: hover Tags: cta, floatui, other Requirements: - Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS - Uses Tailwind CSS for styling - Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation - Responsive and mobile-friendly - No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary - Include all necessary imports - Export as default with sensible prop types Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations. Reference implementation (adapt don't copy): // components/ui/CTA/index.tsx import LinkItem from "../LinkItem"; export default () => (
